title: Developing a carbon strategy with mixed woodland at Brook Farm
body: "Woodland creation case study: Brook Farm.  Kate Thorpe of FW Thorpe PLC talks about the new 146-acre woodland creation project at Brook Farm in Herefordshire. The woodland was funded through EWCO with the aim of offsetting the business’ carbon emissions as part of their carbon strategy.  This project will plant 124,400 mixed broadleaf and conifer trees that will bring numerous benefits. It will provide public access, help with flood prevention, be a source for timber and boost nature recovery.  "
